name: switchbot
description: Control SwitchBot smart-home devices (lights, locks, curtains, sensors, plugs, IR appliances) from an AI agent. Drives the authoritative @switchbot/openapi-cli.

productCategories: IR appliances via Hub (TV / AC / fan / projector)

roadmap.notes: Skill packaging is orthogonal to the CLI's phase numbering. autonomyLevel L3 means 'fully autonomous inside the policy envelope': the skill can draft a rule from intent via `rules suggest`, inject it into policy.yaml via `policy add-rule`, lint, reload, and guide the dry-run→arm transition — all without manual policy.yaml editing. L1 (single command) and L2 (plan suggest + --require-approval) remain available. See the CLI repo's roadmap.md for the authoritative phase and autonomy level definitions.
